reason: While applying the sticky bit is generally a security best practice, the remediation script performs a filesystem-wide scan and applies changes to all world-writable directories. Some legacy or specialized applications may rely on specific directory behaviors that could be disrupted by the sticky bit, and the description explicitly warns to consult application documentation before blindly changing modes.
estimated_impact: filesystems affected; Potential disruption of application-specific directory behaviors; Filesystem-wide scan may impact performance on very large filesystems; Unexpected changes to directory permissions for non-standard software
